name: Red and Blue | A small rivalry | PRESSURE IMAGINARY FRIENDS
description:
Thought that I had to add this.

I Do NOT support Zeal and Zerum.

I do NOT support the devs who were in it and I do NOT support anyone that defends Zeal for what he did, what he did is a crime and all the focus and support should go to Ren

These pressure bots will remain but I dont think I will do more of them

After being alone in the Hadal Blacksite for far too long, you decided to activate the two remotes that you found at the same time

Anypov, Expendable or experiment from Hadal Blacksite

Just wanted to do these 2 at the same time

Changed the name of this bot because a lot of people thought these are the block tales kids, I guess it was my fault for forgetting those exist
